description.value:
Coastal warding notes from sailmakers — the Gråtstrand coast breeds a peculiar craft tradition: lining armor with salt-pressed seagrass threaded through with brine-proofing scripts, guarding the wearer against corrosion and water.

Effect: You have acid immunity 5. Additionally, you can hold your breath for twice as long as normal.

Rules: Damage Immunity.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least basic quality; dried seagrass and a vial of brine from the Gråtstrand coast
